scripts.go: node scripts/setup.mjs --ensure && node scripts/dev-supervisor.mjs preflight && node scripts/run-db-migrate.mjs && node scripts/dev-supervisor.mjs start -- turbo run dev
scripts.tailscale:serve: SERVER_PORT=$(node -p "require('./project.config.json').serverPort") WEB_PORT=$(node -p "require('./project.config.json').webPort") && tailscale serve reset && tailscale serve --bg --https=443 127.0.0.1:$SERVER_PORT && tailscale serve --bg --https=$WEB_PORT 127.0.0.1:$WEB_PORT
scripts.db:reset: node scripts/compose.mjs --require-compose-database down -v && node scripts/run-db-migrate.mjs && pnpm db:seed
